hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' 2>/dev/null | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.rs ]]; then cargo fmt -- "$f" 2>&1; fi; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' 2>/dev/null | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.rs ]]; then cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings 2>&1; fi; }
